nasb.text: The bowl of flour was not exhausted nor did the jar of oil become empty, according to the word of the Lord which He spoke through Elijah.

esv.text: The jar of flour was not spent, neither did the jug of oil become empty, according to the word of the Lord that he spoke by Elijah.

cnv.text: 缸裡的麵粉果然沒有用完，瓶裡的油也沒有短缺，正像耶和華藉著以利亞所說的話一樣。

ccb.text: 坛里的面没有用完，瓶里的油也没有用光，应验了耶和华借以利亚说的话。
